steps.name: Verify the page load with expected URL automationexercise and expected Title Automation Exercise
Verify the page load with expected URL /login and expected Title Signup
Verify Page Header - is displayed for - 'signup' with header - 'New User Signup!'
On Successfull Navigation, entering the signup credentials
On Successfull Signup, Verify if the Detail SignUp Page is loaded
Verify the page load with expected URL /signup and expected Title Signup
Verify the text - 'Account Information' displayed on the page with exactmatch as false
Verify the text - 'Address Information' displayed on the page with exactmatch as true
Verify auto-populated name 'Autobot_1774497597195' and email 'Autobot_1774497597195@cloudyfolk.com' on Sign-Up Details Page
Select gender as 'male'
